title: Applied AI Engineer
company_focus: Marketing automation and customer engagement platform
description:
ABOUT CORDIAL

We founded Cordial in 2014 on the belief that there should
be more humanity and empathy in marketing—both in how brands
communicate with their customers and in how technology
companies work with brands. We built our company and
platform purposefully, driven by a desire to inspire more
thoughtful communication and to create experiences that feel
more personal and human—for consumers, for the people at the
companies we work with, and for Cordial employees. Today,
brands like PacSun, Revolve, Abercrombie & Fitch,
Realtor.com, L.L. Bean and Forbes rely on Cordial to drive
revenue growth by sending a better message.

We chose the name Cordial to symbolize how we empower our
clients to communicate with their customers, as well as how
we do business: with transparency, collaboration, and trust.
We're building a passionate team of individuals willing to
learn, grow, and be thoughtfully challenged on a daily basis
to continuously improve our product, company, and culture
every single day.

OUR VALUES

- Communicate better than the rest
- Own it, every time
- Solve client problems tenaciously
- Make Waves

POSITION SUMMARY

We are looking for an experienced and ambitious builder to
join our team in the role of Applied AI Engineer. In this
role, you will be a primary contributor to our suite of AI
capabilities within the Cordial platform. You will work to
pull in frontier AI work to help our customers be more
efficient and leveraged within the platform. YOU WILL

- Be a primary contributor to our AI strategy, helping design
  and productize AI-powered solutions
- You’ll dive into massive datasets with the autonomy to
  choose what you work on and the ownership to turn ideas
  into real-world results for our clients.
- Serve as an expert sounding board on approaches and
  techniques for integrating LLMs into production
  applications
- Work in partnership with product management to drive
  compelling AI solutions and features
- Continuously explore and implement innovative approaches
  using frontier AI models to solve complex business
  challenges

ABOUT YOU

- 2+ years of professional experience building production
  applications with LLMs and AI technologies
- 5+ years experience with Python
- Track record of shipping and maintaining production services
  at scale
- A deep curiosity and excitement for where AI and applied AI
  systems are headed
- Experience building with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc),
  prompt engineering, and RAG architectures
- Experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain,
  llamaindex)
- Experience with REST API development, NoSQL database design,
  and RDBMS design and optimizations
- Comfortable working in ambiguous environments and defining
  solutions to open-ended problems

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

$140,000.00-$160,000.00 base salary annually. The
compensation range may be adjusted based on experience and
location. In combination with the base salary, Cordial's
compensation package includes equity and bonus, a robust
benefit plan (medical/dental/vision/life), 401k match, and
flexible time off. Additionally, we offer perks such as
childcare and continued education yearly reimbursements. We
pride ourselves in maintaining a healthy work/life balance,
a strong dedication to DE&I efforts, and an overall
respectful and open culture!

Cordial is proud to be an equal opportunity employer that
celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an
inclusive workplace with equal opportunity for all
applicants. Our goal is to recruit the most talented people
from a diverse candidate pool regardless of race, color,
ancestry, national origin, religion, disability status, sex
(including pregnancy), age, gender, gender identity or
expression, sexual orientation, marital status, veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Cordial is committed to working with and providing access
and reasonable accommodation to applicants with mental
and/or physical disabilities. If you require an
accommodation, please reach out to your recruiter once
you've begun the interview process. All requests for
accommodations are treated discreetly and confidentially, as
practical and permitted by law.
responsibilities: Serve as primary contributor to AI strategy and productize AI-powered solutions
Integrate LLMs into production applications and provide expert guidance on approaches
Partner with product management to drive compelling AI solutions and features
Explore and implement innovative approaches using frontier AI models to solve complex business challenges
Dive into massive datasets with autonomy to turn ideas into real-world results for clients
Build and maintain production services at scale with full ownership
use_cases: Enhancing marketing communications with AI-powered personalization and automation
Improving customer engagement through intelligent message optimization and generation
Driving revenue growth for brands by enabling more efficient use of the platform
Solving complex business challenges using frontier AI models and applied AI systems
Helping clients communicate more effectively with their customers through AI capabilities
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role requires hands-on experience building production
applications with LLMs, including prompt engineering, RAG
architectures, and LLM orchestration frameworks. The
engineer will be a primary contributor to AI strategy and
directly implement frontier AI models for production use,
not just support infrastructure.
